name: seance
voice: a seance — the room is WRONG. The whole clip sits under a desaturated teal grade, a soft dim and a breathing vignette; bone words SEEP in on a centered two-row lower-third (a desat mist resolves into Shippori Mincho, blur 8→0, with a ±1-frame arrival jitter, the odd letter flickering, every shadow cast UPWARD). At the apex the lights dip hard and the spoken word MANIFESTS behind the subject in Creepster: it crushes in, squashes, settles, then shudders with a red/cyan split while a cold underlight breathes from below. A cold flash, two mist rings and an ash exhale ride the contact; the word finally exhales upward and is gone.
when: the uncanny, the paranormal, true-crime and horror cold-opens, mystery and the supernatural, anything that should feel haunted or wrong. Loud-but-eerie register. Wants a clip that tolerates a dim teal grade and a behind-the-subject manifestation (20-50% occlusion).
